description: Create comparative domain architecture and pLDDT plot for HSPA12A vs HSPA8
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import requests
import os

# Re-download the AlphaFold PDB files (they don't persist between executions)
for uniprot_id, name in [("O43301", "HSPA12A"), ("P11142", "HSPA8")]:
    url = f"https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-{uniprot_id}-F1-model_v4.pdb"
    resp = requests.get(url)
    if resp.status_code != 200:
        # Try v6
        url = f"https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-{uniprot_id}-F1-model_v6.pdb"
        resp = requests.get(url)
    filepath = f"/tmp/{name}.pdb"
    with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
        f.write(resp.text)
    print(f"Downloaded {name}: {resp.status_code}, {len(resp.text)} bytes")

# Extract pLDDT values
def extract_plddts(filepath):
    residue_plddts = {}
    with open(filepath) as f:
        for line in f:
            if line.startswith("ATOM") and line[12:16].strip() == "CA":
                res_num = int(line[22:26].strip())
                plddt = float(line[60:66].strip())
                residue_plddts[res_num] = plddt
    return residue_plddts

hspa12a_plddts = extract_plddts("/tmp/HSPA12A.pdb")
hspa8_plddts = extract_plddts("/tmp/HSPA8.pdb")

print(f"\nHSPA12A: {len(hspa12a_plddts)} residues")
print(f"HSPA8: {len(hspa8_plddts)} residues")

# Create the comparison figure
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 8))

# HSPA8
ax1 = axes[0]
res_nums = sorted(hspa8_plddts.keys())
plddts = [hspa8_plddts[r] for r in res_nums]
ax1.plot(res_nums, plddts, 'b-', linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.8)
ax1.fill_between(res_nums, plddts, alpha=0.3, color='blue')
ax1.set_title('HSPA8 (Canonical HSP70) — AlphaFold pLDDT', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_ylabel('pLDDT')
ax1.set_ylim(0, 100)
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
ax1.axvspan(6, 380, alpha=0.1, color='green', label='NBD (6-380)')
ax1.axvspan(394, 507, alpha=0.1, color='orange', label='SBDβ (394-507)')
ax1.axvspan(508, 641, alpha=0.1, color='red', label='SBDα/lid (508-641)')
ax1.axvline(x=12, color='darkgreen', linestyle=':', alpha=0.7)
ax1.annotate('IDLGTTNS', xy=(15, 95), fontsize=7, color='darkgreen')
ax1.axvline(x=202, color='darkgreen', linestyle=':', alpha=0.7)
ax1.annotate('DLGGGTFD', xy=(205, 55), fontsize=7, color='darkgreen')
ax1.axvline(x=392, color='purple', linestyle=':', alpha=0.7)
ax1.annotate('DLLLLD', xy=(395, 45), fontsize=7, color='purple')
ax1.legend(loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

# HSPA12A
ax2 = axes[1]
res_nums2 = sorted(hspa12a_plddts.keys())
plddts2 = [hspa12a_plddts[r] for r in res_nums2]
ax2.plot(res_nums2, plddts2, 'r-', linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.8)
ax2.fill_between(res_nums2, plddts2, alpha=0.3, color='red')
ax2.set_title('HSPA12A (Divergent HSP70) — AlphaFold pLDDT', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_ylabel('pLDDT')
ax2.set_xlabel('Residue Number')
ax2.set_ylim(0, 100)
ax2.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
ax2.axvspan(1, 56, alpha=0.15, color='gray', label='N-ext (disordered, 1-56)')
ax2.axvspan(57, 523, alpha=0.1, color='green', label='Divergent NBD (57-523)')
ax2.axvspan(524, 675, alpha=0.1, color='purple', label='C-terminal (no SBD, 524-675)')
ax2.axvline(x=63, color='darkred', linestyle=':', alpha=0.7)
ax2.annotate('DFGTT\n(≠DLGTT)', xy=(66, 92), fontsize=7, color='darkred')
ax2.axvline(x=317, color='darkred', linestyle=':', alpha=0.7)
ax2.annotate('DSGGG\n(≠DLGGG)', xy=(320, 52), fontsize=7, color='darkred')
ax2.annotate('NO substrate-binding domain\nNO interdomain linker', xy=(570, 25), fontsize=9, color='red',
             fontweight='bold', ha='center',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='yellow', alpha=0.7))
ax2.legend(loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/hspa12a_vs_hspa8_domains.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Plot saved.")
